creator: randy@thecobbclan.com
text:
Obligatory: "Me too!!!!" post.

I just finished a fresh/brand-new install using 15.1 instructions (https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/Gitlab-docu/-/blob/master/install/15.1-freebsd.md), so wanted to add that it's not just an issue after an existing system upgrade as well; it also happens from a brand-new install as well.

I also manually added the patch mentioned in the threads and get the same result; it did not correct the problem... I still get a 500 error immediately after logging in.
